mapper.select: select id as productId, number as productNumber, name as productName, supplier_id, is_deleted as productIsDeleted, register_date_time as registerDateTime, update_date_time as updateDateTime from m_product where number = #{productNumber}
mapper.insert: insert into m_product( name, number, supplier_id, image ) value ( #{productName}, #{productNumber}, #{supplierId}, #{image} )
mapper.select: select id as productId, number as productNumber, name as productName, supplier_id, is_deleted as productIsDeleted, register_date_time as productRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as productUpdateDateTime from m_product where id = #{productId} and is_deleted != 1
mapper.update: update m_product set number = #{productNumber}, name = #{productName}, supplier_id = #{supplierId} where id = #{productId}
